question: Based on these maps, what can you conclude about which type of area has higher population density across U.S. states?

options.A: Urban areas clearly have higher population density than rural areas in most states
options.B: Rural areas clearly have higher population density than urban areas in most states
options.C: Both urban and rural areas have similar population density in most states
options.D: It cannot be determined which type has higher population density from these maps alone

explanation: Both maps reuse the same threshold scale, but their underlying distributions differ. This can make one map appear more intense simply because more states fall into the top bin. In the underlying data, Urban Population Density has the higher average value, so that is the only reliable conclusion.
